Package com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.spec

Interface EmbedResource

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    EmbedResourceImpl
    public interface EmbedResource
    Interface defining the contract for interacting with the embedding resource of the Gemini API. This resource provides methods for generating embeddings for text and other types of content.
    Since:
    0.0.2
    Author:
    Everson Novka <enovka@gmail.com>

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      BatchEmbedContentsResponse batchEmbedContent​(BatchEmbedContentsRequest request)
      Generates embeddings for multiple contents in a batch request.
      BatchEmbedContentsRequestBuilder batchEmbedContentsBuilder​(List<String> texts)
      Creates a new BatchEmbedContentsRequestBuilder instance to build a BatchEmbedContentsRequestBuilder for generating embeddings for the given list of texts.
      EmbedContentResponse embedContent​(EmbedContentRequest request)
      Generates an embedding for the given content.
      EmbedContentRequestBuilder embedContentBuilder​(String text)
      Creates a new EmbedContentRequestBuilder instance to build an EmbedContentRequest for generating an embedding for the given text.
      GeminiClient getGeminiClient()
      Returns the associated GeminiClient.

    • Method Detail

      • getGeminiClient

        GeminiClient getGeminiClient()
        Returns the associated GeminiClient.
        Returns:
        The GeminiClient instance.

      • embedContent

        EmbedContentResponse embedContent​(EmbedContentRequest request)
                           throws GeminiApiException,
                                  JsonException,
                                  HttpException
        Generates an embedding for the given content.
        Parameters:
        request - The EmbedContentRequest containing the content to embed and other parameters.
        Returns:
        An EmbedContentResponse containing the generated embedding.
        Throws:
        GeminiApiException - If an error occurs during the embedding generation process.
        JsonException - If an error occurs during JSON processing.
        HttpException - If an error occurs during the HTTP request.

      • batchEmbedContent

        BatchEmbedContentsResponse batchEmbedContent​(BatchEmbedContentsRequest request)
                                      throws GeminiApiException,
                                             JsonException,
                                             HttpException
        Generates embeddings for multiple contents in a batch request.
        Parameters:
        request - The BatchEmbedContentsRequest containing a list of EmbedContentRequest objects.
        Returns:
        A BatchEmbedContentsResponse containing a list of generated embeddings.
        Throws:
        GeminiApiException - If an error occurs during the batch embedding generation process.
        JsonException - If an error occurs during JSON processing.
        HttpException - If an error occurs during the HTTP request.

      • embedContentBuilder

        EmbedContentRequestBuilder embedContentBuilder​(String text)
        Creates a new EmbedContentRequestBuilder instance to build an EmbedContentRequest for generating an embedding for the given text.
        Parameters:
        text - The text to embed.
        Returns:
        A new EmbedContentRequestBuilder instance.

      • batchEmbedContentsBuilder

        BatchEmbedContentsRequestBuilder batchEmbedContentsBuilder​(List<String> texts)
        Creates a new BatchEmbedContentsRequestBuilder instance to build a BatchEmbedContentsRequestBuilder for generating embeddings for the given list of texts.
        Parameters:
        texts - The list of texts to embed.
        Returns:
        A new BatchEmbedContentsRequestBuilder instance.
